description_long: This ornate sconce features a central decorative column with intricate sculptural details, from which six curved arms extend outward, each supporting a cylindrical lampshade. The shades appear to be made of frosted or textured glass, providing a diffused light effect. The arms and central structure are likely crafted from polished metal, possibly chrome or silver-plated, with elaborate embellishments and a glossy finish. The chain or rod at the top suggests it is designed for ceiling mounting, and the overall form is symmetrical and balanced. The fixture exudes a classic, almost vintage elegance, with hints of art deco or neoclassical influence in its scrollwork and geometric motifs. The sconce is substantial in size, suitable for grand urban interiors such as lobbies, theaters, or upscale restaurants.
description: A large, ornate ceiling-mounted sconce with six glass-shaded bulbs and intricate metalwork, exuding vintage elegance and decorative flair.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six glass shades and the central decorative column with detailed scrollwork.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the depth of the cylindrical glass shades.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with symmetrical arrangement of arms and shades visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the arm curvature and the layered decorative elements on the central column.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, neoclassical design with ornate scrollwork and symmetrical arms, complemented by frosted glass shades and a polished metallic finish.
